S14-T4-A-E1:
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(1000, dtype=float)
b = a.copy()
loop = 0.0
for i in range(len(a)):
    loop += a[i] * b[i]
vec = (a * b).sum()
print(abs(loop - vec) < 1e-6)

S14-T4-A-E3:
import numpy as np, time
n = 10000
a = np.zeros(n)
b = np.ones(n)
t0 = time.perf_counter()
c = a + b
_ = time.perf_counter() - t0
print("timed", bool(np.isclose(c.mean(), 1.0)))
